hero.title: From Messy Arabic Documents to
hero.subtitle: Upload invoices, quotations, and contracts in Arabic. Our engine extracts, structures, and indexes them for instant retrieval and cited answers.

trustBar.heading: يثق بنا فرق العمل في المنطقة

items.title: Handwritten Invoices
items.desc: Scribbled numbers and Arabic calligraphy that OCR can't parse.

items.title: WhatsApp Photos
items.desc: Blurry phone photos of receipts sent in chat messages.

items.title: Scanned PDFs
items.desc: Low-resolution scans with stamps, watermarks, and noise.

items.title: Mixed AR / EN
items.desc: Documents mixing Arabic and English with inconsistent direction.

items.title: Inconsistent Formats
items.desc: Every supplier uses different layouts, tables, and structures.

items.title: Multi-page Contracts
items.desc: Long documents spanning pages with tables, terms, and signatures.

pipeline.title: From chaos to clarity in 4 steps

steps.title: Upload
steps.desc: Drop any Arabic document — PDF, photo, scan. We handle the chaos.

steps.title: Extract
steps.desc: ESAP's extraction engine reads every character, stamp, and annotation with human-level accuracy.

steps.title: Structure
steps.desc: Validated JSON: issuer, recipient, line items, totals, dates — bilingual and normalized.

steps.title: Query
steps.desc: Ask in Arabic or English — get cited answers from your document corpus instantly.

demo.title: اسأل أي شيء. احصل على إجابات موثّقة.
demo.subtitle: كل إجابة تحيلك إلى صفحة الفاتورة التي جاءت منها.
demo.userMessageEn: What is the total on invoice INV-2024-0341?

items.title: Intelligent Extraction
items.desc: Our extraction engine reads documents like a human — handwriting, stamps, logos, tables.

items.title: Deep Analysis
items.desc: Multi-pass reasoning for Arabic character disambiguation — ب vs ث, ت vs ش, correctly every time.

items.title: Hybrid Search
items.desc: Multi-signal retrieval combining semantic understanding and keyword matching for maximum recall.

items.title: Bilingual
items.desc: Ask in Arabic or English, search across both. Answers reference the original language.

items.title: Structured Output
items.desc: Clean JSON for every document: parties, line items, totals, dates, terms, and notes.

items.title: Live Processing
items.desc: Upload any document and watch it get extracted, structured, and indexed with live progress.

bilingualProof.title: العربية ليست خياراً ثانوياً.
bilingualProof.subtitle: النصّان يظهران بنفس الوزن في كل سياق.

stats.title: مُجرَّب على مستندات مؤسسية عربية حقيقية.

cta.title: توقّف عن إعادة كتابة الفواتير.
cta.subtitle: ابدأ بطرح الأسئلة عليها بدلاً من ذلك.
